creator: m.fujimoto@yandex.ru
text:
I really like afterstep1-1.0_4.
So, I used the following commands.

% sudo pkg install afterstep1
% sudo pkg install aterm

I can type in aterm, if I use  twm,xfce and afterstep-2.2.12_5.
But, I can not type anything in aterm, if I use afterstep1. >_>
I don't receive any error message.
